featured.title: OrkaIntel
featured.problem: Fraud and criminal networks hide in the seams between public data sources — no single dataset reveals the shape of a scheme.
featured.approach: A GraphRAG platform that maps entity relationships across public data, powered by agentic AI workflows with hypothesis testing, risk scoring, and full audit trails for investigations.

projects.title: Multi-model LLM Aggregator
projects.description: Router that fuses responses across OpenAI, Claude, and Gemini — early exploration of model gateways and token management.

projects.title: NLP Hockey Scout
projects.description: Sports-specific sentiment pipeline using Hugging Face SportsBERT with 100% test coverage.

projects.title: RL Tic-Tac-Toe
projects.description: Containerized FastAPI service hosting a Q-learning agent with a React UI — end-to-end model deployment.

projects.title: DK Design System Tool
projects.description: Role-based PHP + MySQL app that CRUDs design tokens via JSON/XML endpoints.
